field.label: Instance
field.help: The Nebula instance this rule applies to.

field.label: Direction
field.help: Whether this rule governs inbound or outbound traffic on the overlay.

field.label: Protocol
field.help: IP protocol this rule matches (any, tcp, udp or icmp).

field.label: Port
field.help: Port or port range this rule matches. Use 'any' for all ports, '0' for fragments, or a range like '200-300'.

field.label: Description
field.help: Optional human-readable label for this rule.

field.label: Host
field.help: A remote certificate name, or 'any' to match every host.

field.label: Groups
field.help: Match peers in ALL of these groups (AND logic). Add each group as a tag. A single group matches peers in that group.

field.label: CIDR
field.help: Match peers whose overlay IP is within this remote CIDR.

field.label: CA name
field.help: Match peers whose certificate was issued by a CA with this name. Type a name or pick one of your configured CAs; it must name a CA this node trusts.

field.label: CA fingerprint (sha)
field.help: Match peers whose issuing CA has this fingerprint.

field.label: Local CIDR
field.help: Optional: restrict the rule to traffic for this local-side CIDR (used with unsafe routes). Leave empty for the node's own address.
